title: Lesson Start!
description: Welcome to Garoop! Let's learn amazing things with Garuchan!

scenes.speech: Welcome! Let's have fun learning together with Garuchan!
scenes.title: Welcome to Garoop!

scenes.speech: Garoop is a platform for kids to learn technology and AI in a fun way!
scenes.title: What Is Garoop?
scenes.content: At Garoop, you can learn programming, AI, math, and game development in an exciting way. One step at a time!

scenes.speech: The best way to learn is to try things and build something yourself!
scenes.title: How to Learn Effectively
scenes.content: Don't just watch — try it! Build small projects, explore, and don't be afraid to fail. Failure is how you grow!

scenes.speech: AI is the technology of the future — and it's already here today!
scenes.title: The World of AI
scenes.content: ChatGPT, AI images, AI music — these are all technologies you can learn and use right now!
scenes.highlight: 🎨 Image AI  🎵 Music AI  💬 Chat AI  🔧 Code AI

scenes.speech: Programming is an essential skill for the future. Start now!
scenes.title: Why Learn Coding?
scenes.content: In the future, almost every job will involve technology. Learning to code today prepares you for a bright future!
scenes.highlight: 2030: 85% of future jobs don't exist yet!

scenes.speech: Set your learning goals! What do you want to become in the future?
scenes.title: Set Your Goals!
scenes.content: Programmer? Game developer? AI scientist? Entrepreneur? Whatever your dream, start learning today! One small step changes everything.

scenes.speech: Let's start your learning journey! Garuchan will always be by your side!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
